name: roborev
description: Agent skills for roborev code review, fix, refine, and response workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Review, fix, and respond to roborev findings from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use roborev skills to request code or design reviews, fix open review findings, iterate with refine, and respond to reviews from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Respond to a roborev review with $roborev:roborev-respond.
